title: All 8 Best New Artist Nominees To Perform At The 2026 Grammys
text: All eight Best New Artist nominees performed in a special segment during the ceremony. The nominees were Addison Rae, Alex Warren, KATSEYE, Leon Thomas, Lola Young, Olivia Dean, SOMBR, and The Marías. Olivia Dean took home the Best New Artist award. In her acceptance speech, she stated: I never imagined I'd be up here, let alone nominated and used the platform to acknowledge her immigrant heritage. The performance segment showcased the category's diversity, featuring Gnarly by KATSEYE and Man I Need by Olivia Dean among the highlights, demonstrating varied musical styles from pop to soul across the nominees.
